text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The wildly popular Umamusume model Gold City
has announced her intention to run in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Juggling both career paths leaves her with an
intense schedule, but despite her workload, she
remains passionately dedicated to her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her motive—to make everyone see that she's not
just some pretty doll.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to show the world her "true self," we
begin our daily efforts to prove her skill.
